scripts.dev: npm run fix:port3000 && NEXT_TELEMETRY_DISABLED=1 USE_LOCAL_NEXT_CACHE=1 next dev -p 3000
scripts.dev:clean: npm run clean && npm run dev
scripts.dev:repair: npm run fix:port3000 && npm run dev:clean
scripts.dev:icloud: npm run fix:port3000 && NEXT_TELEMETRY_DISABLED=1 USE_LOCAL_NEXT_CACHE=1 WATCHPACK_POLLING=true next dev -p 3000
scripts.dev:bg: npm run fix:port3000 && sh -c 'nohup env NEXT_TELEMETRY_DISABLED=1 USE_LOCAL_NEXT_CACHE=1 npx next dev -p 3000 > /tmp/thewalk-dev.log 2>&1 < /dev/null & echo $!'
scripts.dev:doctor: sh -c 'set -e; echo "[doctor] clearing port 3000"; lsof -ti :3000 | xargs kill -9 2>/dev/null || true; echo "[doctor] starting dev server"; NEXT_TELEMETRY_DISABLED=1 USE_LOCAL_NEXT_CACHE=1 npx next dev -p 3000 >/tmp/thewalk-dev-doctor.log 2>&1 & pid=$!; sleep 3; echo "[doctor] listeners"; lsof -nP -iTCP:3000 -sTCP:LISTEN || true; echo "[doctor] curl http://127.0.0.1:3000"; curl -sS -o /dev/null -w "status=%{http_code} time=%{time_total}s\n" --max-time 8 http://127.0.0.1:3000/ || true; echo "[doctor] recent dev output"; sed -n "1,120p" /tmp/thewalk-dev-doctor.log; kill -9 $pid 2>/dev/null || true'
scripts.dev:lan: npm run fix:port3000 && NEXT_TELEMETRY_DISABLED=1 USE_LOCAL_NEXT_CACHE=1 next dev -H 0.0.0.0 -p 3000
scripts.dev:turbo: npm run fix:port3000 && NEXT_TELEMETRY_DISABLED=1 USE_LOCAL_NEXT_CACHE=1 next dev -p 3000 --turbo
